rows.requirement_text: FOM module/SOM module merging rules
rows.service_or_check: FOM module/SOM module merging rules

rows.requirement_text: OMT data interchange format
rows.service_or_check: OMT data interchange format

rows.requirement_text: OMT conformance XML Schema
rows.service_or_check: OMT conformance XML Schema

rows.requirement_text: MOM object and interaction exposure is derived from the active MIM/FOM catalog
rows.service_or_check: MOM object and interaction exposure is derived from the active MIM/FOM catalog

rows.requirement_text: Strict MOM decoding reports and raises through generated parameterized negative-path tests
rows.service_or_check: Strict MOM decoding reports and raises through generated parameterized negative-path tests

rows.requirement_text: MOM reports use the exact parameter names declared in the active MIM catalog
rows.service_or_check: MOM reports use the exact parameter names declared in the active MIM catalog

rows.requirement_text: MOM HLAservice interactions are modeled as RTI-received actions with negative-path service failure reporting
rows.service_or_check: MOM HLAservice interactions are modeled as RTI-received actions with negative-path service failure reporting

rows.requirement_text: A MOM observer witness can reconstruct federation-visible MOM objects, reports, and service invocation traffic
rows.service_or_check: A MOM observer witness can reconstruct federation-visible MOM objects, reports, and service invocation traffic

rows.requirement_text: FOM/MIM XML parsing and name-bearing OMT catalog extraction cover the active 1516.2 object, interaction, attribute, parameter, dimension, and time tables
rows.service_or_check: FOM/MIM XML parsing and name-bearing OMT catalog extraction cover the active 1516.2 object, interaction, attribute, parameter, dimension, and time tables

rows.requirement_text: FOM module merge and MIM/FOM combination rules are enforced for the supported 1516.2 subset
rows.service_or_check: FOM module merge and MIM/FOM combination rules are enforced for the supported 1516.2 subset

rows.requirement_text: Annex E schema-family conformance validation is executable for the carried standard schemas and round-trip witnesses
rows.service_or_check: Annex E schema-family conformance validation is executable for the carried standard schemas and round-trip witnesses

rows.requirement_text: Service-report file output contains initial and per-service records with section anchors
rows.service_or_check: Service-report file output contains initial and per-service records with section anchors

rows.requirement_text: Timestamp-order queues respect local GALT/LITS-style lower-bound rules and DDM filtering before delivery
rows.service_or_check: Timestamp-order queues respect local GALT/LITS-style lower-bound rules and DDM filtering before delivery

rows.requirement_text: Save/restore coordinates with time-state and restores logical-time state
rows.service_or_check: Save/restore coordinates with time-state and restores logical-time state

rows.requirement_text: Save/restore reinstates saved object existence, name mapping, attribute values, and ownership state
rows.service_or_check: Save/restore reinstates saved object existence, name mapping, attribute values, and ownership state

rows.requirement_text: Save/restore reinstates saved federate runtime flags, policy switches, reporting switches, conveyance state, order-override state, and transportation-override state
rows.service_or_check: Save/restore reinstates saved federate runtime flags, policy switches, reporting switches, conveyance state, order-override state, and transportation-override state

rows.requirement_text: Save/restore treats callback enablement as local runtime policy rather than persisted federation state
rows.service_or_check: Save/restore treats callback enablement as local runtime policy rather than persisted federation state

rows.requirement_text: Save/restore discards stale pre-restore callback-queue and message-retraction bookkeeping state
rows.service_or_check: Save/restore discards stale pre-restore callback-queue and message-retraction bookkeeping state

rows.requirement_text: Save/restore reinstates saved object and interaction subscription-routing state rather than preserving dirty post-save declaration mutations
rows.service_or_check: Save/restore reinstates saved object and interaction subscription-routing state rather than preserving dirty post-save declaration mutations

rows.requirement_text: Declaration-management state gates registration, update, and interaction send behavior
rows.service_or_check: Declaration-management state gates registration, update, and interaction send behavior

rows.requirement_text: Declaration subscriptions drive discover/reflect/receive delivery visibility
rows.service_or_check: Declaration subscriptions drive discover/reflect/receive delivery visibility

rows.requirement_text: DM subscriptions and DDM scope filtering compose before delivery
rows.service_or_check: DM subscriptions and DDM scope filtering compose before delivery

rows.requirement_text: Object attribute routing is suppressed while regions are out of scope and resumes when regions overlap
rows.service_or_check: Object attribute routing is suppressed while regions are out of scope and resumes when regions overlap

rows.requirement_text: DM or DDM subscription declarations are required before object discovery, attribute reflection, or interaction receipt occurs
rows.service_or_check: DM or DDM subscription declarations are required before object discovery, attribute reflection, or interaction receipt occurs

rows.requirement_text: Object-scope transitions emit Attributes In Scope and Attributes Out Of Scope callbacks for known subscribed attributes
rows.service_or_check: Object-scope transitions emit Attributes In Scope and Attributes Out Of Scope callbacks for known subscribed attributes

rows.requirement_text: Object registration, discovery, known-class behavior, and removal form a stable object lifecycle
rows.service_or_check: Object registration, discovery, known-class behavior, and removal form a stable object lifecycle

rows.requirement_text: Discovery chooses the closest subscribed superclass and the discovered class remains stable for later lookups
rows.service_or_check: Discovery chooses the closest subscribed superclass and the discovered class remains stable for later lookups

rows.requirement_text: Attribute-value update requests trigger Provide Attribute Value Update at relevant owners
rows.service_or_check: Attribute-value update requests trigger Provide Attribute Value Update at relevant owners

rows.requirement_text: Request Attribute Value Update routes object-target and class-target requests only to relevant owning federates
rows.service_or_check: Request Attribute Value Update routes object-target and class-target requests only to relevant owning federates

rows.requirement_text: Object-management routing semantics cover transport choice, scope, and local-delete restrictions
rows.service_or_check: Object-management routing semantics cover transport choice, scope, and local-delete restrictions

rows.requirement_text: Local delete clears only the invoking federate's object knowledge and allows later rediscovery
rows.service_or_check: Local delete clears only the invoking federate's object knowledge and allows later rediscovery

rows.requirement_text: An ownerless object instance remains discoverable to a joined federate until that federate locally deletes it
rows.service_or_check: An ownerless object instance remains discoverable to a joined federate until that federate locally deletes it

rows.requirement_text: An orphaned object remains discoverable to existing and late subscribers, supports local-delete knowledge clearing, and is removed globally only by explicit delete
rows.service_or_check: An orphaned object remains discoverable to existing and late subscribers, supports local-delete knowledge clearing, and is removed globally only by explicit delete

rows.requirement_text: Attribute relevance is determined from the combination of publication, subscription, ownership, and DDM scope on a single object instance
rows.service_or_check: Attribute relevance is determined from the combination of publication, subscription, ownership, and DDM scope on a single object instance

rows.requirement_text: A timestamped delete removes the object from federation knowledge only after the time-managed remove callback is delivered
rows.service_or_check: A timestamped delete removes the object from federation knowledge only after the time-managed remove callback is delivered

rows.requirement_text: Subscribed and FOM-declared update-rate settings throttle eligible reflected updates across direct, inherited, and regioned subscriptions without suppressing receive-order delivery that has no logical-time basis
rows.service_or_check: Subscribed and FOM-declared update-rate settings throttle eligible reflected updates across direct, inherited, and regioned subscriptions without suppressing receive-order delivery that has no logical-time basis

rows.requirement_text: Reflected attributes are reported using the subscriber's known discovered class handles
rows.service_or_check: Reflected attributes are reported using the subscriber's known discovered class handles

rows.requirement_text: Declaration-management publication and subscription state takes effect even while federates are time managed
rows.service_or_check: Declaration-management publication and subscription state takes effect even while federates are time managed

rows.requirement_text: Unpublishing object-class attributes removes the federate's ability to perform strict updates for those attributes
rows.service_or_check: Unpublishing object-class attributes removes the federate's ability to perform strict updates for those attributes

rows.requirement_text: Unpublishing an interaction class removes the federate's ability to perform strict sends for that class
rows.service_or_check: Unpublishing an interaction class removes the federate's ability to perform strict sends for that class

rows.requirement_text: Unsubscribing object-class attributes removes interest in later reflected updates for those attributes
rows.service_or_check: Unsubscribing object-class attributes removes interest in later reflected updates for those attributes

rows.requirement_text: Transportation-type change, query, and report services emit confirm/report callbacks for the backend's supported reliable and best-effort subset
rows.service_or_check: Transportation-type change, query, and report services emit confirm/report callbacks for the backend's supported reliable and best-effort subset

rows.requirement_text: Best-effort transportation semantics, including FOM-defined defaults and explicit overrides, are implemented distinctly from reliable transport and persist across restore
rows.service_or_check: Best-effort transportation semantics, including FOM-defined defaults and explicit overrides, are implemented distinctly from reliable transport and persist across restore

rows.requirement_text: Two-federate Target/Radar simulation runs over Python RTI and Java shim profiles
rows.service_or_check: Two-federate Target/Radar simulation runs over Python RTI and Java shim profiles
